summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CLT Synapse ERP P0 features: Employee Master page with Add Employee modal (resolved), HR sync-options API, Customer Service Kanban with drag-and-drop, Mentor CRM Kanban with drag-and-drop, HR Leave Management, and HR Payroll pages. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Super Admin login successful
Backend: HR sync-options returns departments (8 departments)
Backend: HR sync-options returns roles (14 roles with value/label/description)
Backend: HR sync-options returns teams (3 teams)
Backend: HR sync-options returns managers (1 manager)
Backend: HR sync-options returns locations (5 locations)
Backend: HR sync-options returns employment_types (5 types)
Backend: HR employees list returns employee records
Backend: HR next-employee-id returns CLT-002
Backend: Students API returns students with stage field
Backend: Students API supports mentor_stage field
Backend: Student stage update works (CS Kanban drag-drop simulation)
Backend: Student mentor_stage update works (Mentor CRM drag-drop simulation)
Backend: HR Leave Requests endpoint returns list
Backend: HR Leave Balance endpoint responds
Backend: HR Payroll list returns records
Backend: CS stages are valid for Kanban
Backend: Mentor stages are valid for Kanban
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Employee Master page loads with stats (Total Employees, Active, On Probation, Doc Expiry Alerts)
Frontend: Add Employee button opens modal successfully (NO CRASH)

Frontend: Add Employee modal has all required fields (Employee ID auto-populated, Full Name, Company Email, Department dropdown, Designation, System Role dropdown, Team dropdown, Joining Date, Status)
Frontend: Employee Modal Create User Account toggle works
Frontend: Customer Service page loads with 7 Kanban columns
Frontend: CS Kanban columns: New Student, Activated, Satisfactory Call, Pitched Upgrade, In Progress, Interested, Not Interested
Frontend: CS Kanban drag handles visible (DnD enabled via @dnd-kit)
Frontend: CS Student detail modal opens on card click
Frontend: Mentor CRM page loads with 5 Kanban columns
Frontend: Mentor Kanban columns: New Student, Discussion Started, Pitched Redeposit, Interested, Closed (Deposit)
Frontend: Mentor Kanban drag handles visible (DnD enabled)
Frontend: HR Leave Management page loads with stats and table
Frontend: HR Payroll page loads with stats and batch table
critical_code_review_comments: Employee Modal crash issue resolved - modal opens and works correctly
HR sync-options API returns all needed data: departments, roles, teams, managers, locations, employment_types
Customer Service Kanban properly implements @dnd-kit with DndContext, SortableContext, useSortable, useDroppable
Mentor CRM Kanban follows same DnD pattern as Sales CRM and Customer Service
Student stage update APIs work for both CS (stage) and Mentor (mentor_stage) Kanban drag-drop
All HR module pages (Leave Management, Payroll) are functional
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 1 employee (Ahmed Khan CLT-001), 1 student (mohammed Aqib), 1 payroll batch (2026-02)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working: 1) Employee Master at /hr/employees with Add Employee modal that auto-populates Employee ID and has all form fields. 2) HR sync-options API at /api/hr/employees/sync-options returns departments, roles, teams, managers, locations, employment_types. 3) Customer Service Kanban at /cs with 7 columns and @dnd-kit drag-drop. 4) Mentor CRM Kanban at /mentor with 5 columns and @dnd-kit drag-drop. 5) HR Leave Management at /hr/leave with stats and request table. 6) HR Payroll at /hr/payroll with batch processing.

features_verified.employee_modal: Working - Opens without crash, all fields present (Employee ID, Full Name, Company Email, Department, Designation, System Role, Team, Joining Date, Status), Create User Account toggle
features_verified.hr_sync_options_api: Working - Returns departments(8), roles(14), teams(3), managers(1), locations(5), employment_types(5)
features_verified.customer_service_kanban: Working - 7 columns (new_student, activated, satisfactory_call, pitched_for_upgrade, in_progress, interested, not_interested), drag handles visible, student detail modal opens
features_verified.mentor_crm_kanban: Working - 5 columns (new_student, discussion_started, pitched_for_redeposit, interested, closed), drag handles visible
features_verified.hr_leave_management: Working - Stats cards (Pending, Approved, Total Days, Rejected), All Requests and Pending Approval tabs, Leave Requests table
features_verified.hr_payroll: Working - Stats cards (Payroll Batches, Total Gross, Total Net, Employees Processed), Payroll Batches table with View/HR Approve actions

ui_pages_tested: /hr/employees - Employee Master with Add Employee modal

dnd_kit_implementation.customer_service: Uses DndContext, DragOverlay, closestCenter, PointerSensor, KeyboardSensor, SortableContext, useSortable, useDroppable, CSS.Transform
dnd_kit_implementation.drag_drop_updates_via: studentApi.update() with stage or mentor_stage field
